top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
AND l.GOT BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(GOT) FROM Laboratory WHERE GOT IS NOT NULL) 
AND (SELECT MAX(GOT) FROM Laboratory WHERE GOT IS NOT NULL);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
AND l.GOT BETWEEN 10 AND 40;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
AND l.GOT BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(GOT) FROM Laboratory WHERE GOT IS NOT NULL) 
AND (SELECT MAX(GOT) FROM Laboratory WHERE GOT IS NOT NULL);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID) 
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
AND l.GOT >= 10 
AND l.GOT <= 40;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
AND l.GOT BETWEEN 10 AND 40;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
AND l.GOT BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(GOT) FROM Laboratory WHERE GOT IS NOT NULL) 
AND (SELECT MAX(GOT) FROM Laboratory WHERE GOT IS NOT NULL);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
    FROM Patient p
    INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
    WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
    AND l.GOT BETWEEN 10 AND 40
) AS male_normal_GOT;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID) 
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
AND l.GOT >= 10 
AND l.GOT <= 40;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
AND l.GOT BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(GOT) FROM Laboratory WHERE GOT IS NOT NULL) 
AND (SELECT MAX(GOT) FROM Laboratory WHERE GOT IS NOT NULL);
